name: Impossible Cranberry-Orange Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Grease a pie plate measuring 10 x 1 1/2 inches.
3. Sprinkle the relish evenly over the bottom of the plate.
4. In a blender or with a hand beater, mix together the remaining ingredients except whipped cream until smooth (about 30 seconds to 1 minute).
5. Pour the mixture into the plate.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes, or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the pie to cool completely.
8. Refrigerate for at least 6 hours but no more than 24 hours before serving.
9. Garnish with whipped cream.
